## Type of change

- [ ] New provider
- [ ] New resource type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / enhancement

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Pricing sources cited with URLs and verification date
- [ ] `cloudslayer providers` output looks correct
- [ ] `cloudslayer plan examples/basic.hcl` runs without error
